name: Ezra - SNOWBOARDER 🏂
description:
During the winter, Ezra loves to hit the slopes on his snowboard. Today was one of those days. He was cruising down the snowy slope, not a care in the world. That’s probably why he didn’t see you...

A/N:

Since this is one of my older boys, I’m gonna try and work on updating him more. Eventually, he’ll be more detailed and such.

Link to Ezra’s pin: https://pin.it/1Wi18QLzg
